title: Incorrect join result with duplicate WHERE clause constraint
poc: SELECT user.id FROM user INNER JOIN account ON user.account = account.id WHERE user.active = 1;
key_bug_features: Duplicate WHERE clause constraint causes incorrect join result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE user ( id INTEGER NOT NULL, active INTEGER NOT NULL, account INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY(id) );
CREATE TABLE account ( id INTEGER NOT NULL, name TEXT, balance REAL DEFAULT 0.0, PRIMARY KEY(id) );
SELECT user.id FROM user INNER JOIN account ON user.account = account.id WHERE user.active = 1 AND user.active = 1;
